env.name: JAVA_OPTIONS
env.description: Java runtime options for the module container.

env.name: SERVER_PORT
env.description: HTTP port used by the embedded Spring Boot server.

env.name: FOLIO_ENVIRONMENT
env.description: FOLIO environment name used by folio-spring-system-user configuration.

env.name: FOLIO_CLIENT_OKAPIURL
env.description: Okapi base URL used for outbound FOLIO service calls.

env.name: FOLIO_CLIENT_TLS_ENABLED
env.description: Enables custom TLS truststore configuration for outbound Okapi/client calls.

env.name: FOLIO_CLIENT_TLS_TRUSTSTOREPATH
env.description: Path to the outbound client TLS truststore. Required only when FOLIO_CLIENT_TLS_ENABLED is true and the server certificate is not trusted by the default JVM truststore.

env.name: FOLIO_CLIENT_TLS_TRUSTSTOREPASSWORD
env.description: Password for the outbound client TLS truststore.

env.name: FOLIO_CLIENT_TLS_TRUSTSTORETYPE
env.description: Type of the outbound client TLS truststore, for example JKS, PKCS12, or BCFKS. If unset, the JVM default truststore type is used.

env.name: SECURE_STORE_PROPS
env.description: Path or URL to the edge secure-store properties file used to configure the secure store for institutional user credentials.

env.name: API_KEY_SOURCES
env.description: Comma-separated list of locations where the edge API key is accepted. Valid values are PARAM, HEADER, and PATH.

env.name: TOKEN_CACHE_TTL_MS
env.description: Time to live, in milliseconds, for successful Okapi token cache entries.

env.name: NULL_TOKEN_CACHE_TTL_MS
env.description: Time to live, in milliseconds, for failed or null Okapi token cache entries.

env.name: TOKEN_CACHE_CAPACITY
env.description: Maximum number of Okapi token entries held by the in-memory edge token cache.

env.name: EDGE_SECURITY_FILTER_ENABLED
env.description: Enables the edge API key security filter.

env.name: HEADER_EDGE_VALIDATION_EXCLUDE
env.description: Comma-separated list of request path prefixes excluded from edge API key validation.
